airtableModel.notes: This file intentionally excludes Airtable base IDs, field IDs, API keys, and private connector identifiers.

intakeFlow.browserBehavior: Score request, rank contractors, create local Airtable-ready handoff package.
intakeFlow.productionBehavior: Submit to a secure server endpoint that validates input and writes to Website Intake Queue, Jobs, Matches, and Tasks.
intakeFlow.securityRule: Never expose Airtable credentials in the browser.
